subcodes.first_line: Your letter, which betokeneth your turning unto God, your taking hold of the cord of His grace, and your clinging to the hem of His mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب شما که دلالت بر توجه الی الله و توسل بحبل عنایت و تشبث بر ذیل رحمت
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
